basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate-I
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Junior Research Fellow / Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on 27 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./M.E. degree in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering/ Mechanical Engineering, or allied disciplines., B.Tech./M.Sc. in Metallurgy/Materials Science, or allied disciplines.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow / Project Associate-I: Essential: M.Tech./M.E. degree in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering/ Mechanical Engineering, or allied disciplines. OR B.Tech./M.Sc. in Metallurgy/Materials Science, or allied disciplines. Desirable: hands-on experience in mechanical testing and microstructural characterization techniques such as SEM-EBSD and/or TEM, and X-ray diffraction analysis.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 30,000/- + HRA - Rs. 37,000/- + HRA Per Month
salary_details.details: Rs. 30,000/- + HRA - Rs. 37,000/- + HRA Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the IIT Roorkee recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is JRF (Junior Research Fellow) / Project Associate-I.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the JRF (Junior Research Fellow) / Project Associate-I position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF / Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 30,000/- + HRA to Rs. 37,000/- + HRA Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Essential qualifications include M.Tech./M.E. in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering/ Mechanical Engineering, or allied disciplines, or B.Tech./M.Sc. in Metallurgy/Materials Science, or allied disciplines.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 18-05-2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q8. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee, Roorkee, Uttarakhand, 247667.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificate if applicable.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age limit mentioned for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data; please refer to the official notification for specific age criteria.
